spine.label: Entry / Assessment
spine.definition: First-touch placement + the scored assessment(s) that establish a baseline.

spine.label: AI Diagnose
spine.definition: AI interpretation of signals/competencies into an explainable diagnosis.

spine.label: Learn / Act / Grow
spine.definition: Learning, practice, intervention, application, or hiring action.

spine.label: Reports
spine.definition: Report / passport / dashboard surface for the subject + stakeholders.

templates.label: Learner growth
templates.note: Individual-learner growth loop; front-half mature, back-half adoption-gated.

journeys.label: Student → Career
journeys.definition: A student traverses entry assessment → AI diagnosis → recommendations → guided growth toward a career direction.
journeys.aiInterpretation: Behavioural signal → concern routing + competency diagnosis (behavioral-signal + PIL runtime guidance).
journeys.outcomes: Career direction chosen / growth progressed; realized-outcome tail adoption-gated.
journeys.kpis: Assessment completion; recommendation engagement; re-measure rate.
journeys.entryCriteria: New student session via FreeAssessmentModal or Career Builder entry.
journeys.completionCriteria: Diagnosis + recommendations delivered; growth actions surfaced.
journeys.statusNote: Strong front-half (entry→diagnose→recommend→grow); no systematic re-measure/exit surfaced per-journey. The re-measure MECHANISM exists (Phase 1.3 reuse) but per-journey adoption is pending (Coverage⟂Adoption). Front-end results surfaces occasionally lack a "next step" CTA (see GAP-J4).

journeys.label: Fresher → Placement
journeys.definition: A fresher/final-year student traverses entry → diagnosis → recommendations → application toward a placement.
journeys.aiInterpretation: Competency + readiness diagnosis; role-DNA crosswalk for fit.
journeys.reports: Career passport; launchpad readiness; placement surfaces.
journeys.dashboards: Career Launchpad dashboard; campus placement explorer.
journeys.kpis: Launchpad completion; application rate; placement rate.
journeys.entryCriteria: Fresher enters Career Launchpad / campus placement flow.
journeys.completionCriteria: Readiness built + applications routed; placement loop reachable.
journeys.statusNote: Launchpad + campus placement are live (career-launchpad + campus-placement). Realized placement-outcome capture is the universal adoption-gated tail (Adoption⟂Coverage).

journeys.label: Professional → Progression
journeys.definition: A working professional traverses entry → diagnosis → recommendations → growth toward role progression.
journeys.outcomes: Role progression / promotion; adoption-gated outcome tail.
journeys.kpis: Re-run rate; positive-movement rate; progression cadence.
journeys.statusNote: Progression is DERIVED, not criteria-gated end-to-end; evidence-gated progression supplies the readiness gate but per-journey exit/promotion criteria + realized-outcome adoption are pending (Coverage⟂Adoption).

journeys.label: Employee → Competency / EI
journeys.definition: An enterprise employee traverses entry → baseline → diagnosis → recommendations for competency / EI development.
journeys.reports: Competency / EI report; competency intelligence dashboard.
journeys.outcomes: Competency uplift; EI development; adoption-gated outcome tail.
journeys.kpis: Baseline coverage; competency movement; EI delta.
journeys.entryCriteria: Employee enrolled in competency / EI assessment.
journeys.statusNote: Competency + EI diagnosis is well-supported; realized development-outcome capture is the universal adoption-gated tail (Adoption⟂Coverage).

journeys.label: HR / Recruiter → Hire
journeys.definition: A recruiter traverses post → assess → interview → match → decide toward a hiring decision.
journeys.recommendationRules: Talent-match ranking → interview → hire decision support.
journeys.dashboards: Employer portal; hiring funnel; governance console.
journeys.entryCriteria: Recruiter posts a job / opens a candidate funnel.
journeys.statusNote: 9-stage hiring funnel is the most complete journey family. Realized hiring-outcome capture exists (employer-ecosystem outcome tracking); adoption is reported separately (Adoption⟂Coverage; k_min=30 for calibration).

journeys.label: Employer Org → Talent
journeys.definition: An employer organisation traverses onboard → post → match to build a talent pipeline.
journeys.dashboards: Employer portal; Workforce OS; governance console.
journeys.outcomes: Talent pipeline built / roles filled (talent outcome).
journeys.kpis: Pipeline size; fill rate; match quality.
journeys.completionCriteria: Roles posted → candidates matched (job-store split bridged).
journeys.statusNote: Employer onboarding → post → match is supported; the job-store split (posting→job_postings, assessment/interview→employer_jobs) is bridged. Realized outcome tail adoption-gated.

journeys.label: Institute Admin → Cohort
journeys.definition: An institute admin traverses aggregate → k-anon → act on cohort intelligence.
journeys.kpis: Cohort coverage; cohort movement; placement rate.
journeys.statusNote: Real k-anon aggregation (MX-302H) — scores masked below k_min, roster always shown. Realized cohort-outcome tail adoption-gated.

journeys.label: Parent → Support Child
journeys.definition: A parent traverses view → consent → support actions for their child.
journeys.aiInterpretation: Child progress framing via consent-scoped view.
journeys.statusNote: Journey starts (view→consent) and the support-action substrate EXISTS (journeyTailCompletion: jt_parent_support_actions, fail-closed on child ownership), but the tail is thin and the public consent-approval surface lacks a clean redirect back into the dashboard journey (GAP-J2 / GAP-J5). Tail is gated by the journeyTailCompletion flag (Coverage⟂Adoption).

journeys.label: Mentor / Coach → Mentee
journeys.definition: A mentor traverses match → engage → guide a mentee.
journeys.kpis: Match rate; engagement cadence; mentee movement.
journeys.statusNote: Match + engagement substrate EXISTS (journeyTailCompletion: jt_mentor_engagements, gated BOTH directions via mentor_bookings to avoid IDOR) but the engagement tail is thin. Tail is gated by the journeyTailCompletion flag (Coverage⟂Adoption).

journeys.label: Faculty → Students
journeys.definition: A faculty member views a batch-confined nested cohort journey under the institute.
journeys.statusNote: Faculty exists as a role-aware scope nested within the institute cohort journey (batch-confined, 403 role_not_authorised) but is not a first-class top-level journey surface (GAP-J2 family).

journeys.label: Teacher / Counsellor
journeys.definition: Teacher/counsellor survey is collected but has no downstream journey — a true dead-end.
journeys.aiInterpretation: None downstream — survey input captured, no diagnosis surfaced.
journeys.completionCriteria: Survey stored — no downstream step exists.
journeys.statusNote: GAP-J1 — TRUE dead-end: survey collected, zero continuation. The jt_stakeholder_observations substrate exists (staff-only) but is not wired into a downstream journey. The frozen blueprint recommends converting this to a continuation using EXISTING substrate (NOT a rebuild) — deferred to a later program, classified honestly here.

journeys.label: Any Persona → Realized Outcome (tail)
journeys.definition: The universal close-the-loop tail: every journey should end in a measured realized outcome.
journeys.outcomes: Realized outcome captured (placed / hired / progressed / mastered).
journeys.entryCriteria: A subject reaches a re-measure / exit boundary.
journeys.statusNote: The frozen blueprint marked this MISSING everywhere. CURRENT honest state: Phase 1.3 CLOSED the close-the-loop MECHANISM via REUSE (no new engine) — captureProgressionOutcome() + getReassessmentSignal() write/derive realized outcomes into validation_loop_outcomes, gated by the longitudinalOutcomeCapture flag. So the mechanism is now CODE-COMPLETE (Coverage), moving this from MISSING → PARTIAL; what remains is per-journey ADOPTION (real re-administration/outcome volume, currently honest-low/0, reported SEPARATELY by composeOutcomeTailAdoption — Adoption⟂Coverage, null≠0). This phase does NOT build new outcome machinery.

duplicate_entrances.rationale: Multiple entrances to ONE flow — the pre-existing CTAs are current behaviour; removing entrances would break byte-identical-OFF. Not duplicate journeys.
Different entry points to assessment; flagship consumer flow vs flag-gated adaptive runtime. Keep separate, keep both.

coverage.label: Student → Career
coverage.statusNote: Strong front-half (entry→diagnose→recommend→grow); no systematic re-measure/exit surfaced per-journey. The re-measure MECHANISM exists (Phase 1.3 reuse) but per-journey adoption is pending (Coverage⟂Adoption). Front-end results surfaces occasionally lack a "next step" CTA (see GAP-J4).

Tail is gated by the journeyTailCompletion flag (Coverage⟂Adoption).

coverage.statusNote: Faculty exists as a role-aware scope nested within the institute cohort journey (batch-confined, 403 role_not_authorised) but is not a first-class top-level journey surface (GAP-J2 family).

coverage.statusNote: GAP-J1 — TRUE dead-end: survey collected, zero continuation. The jt_stakeholder_observations substrate exists (staff-only) but is not wired into a downstream journey. The frozen blueprint recommends converting this to a continuation using EXISTING substrate (NOT a rebuild) — deferred to a later program, classified honestly here.

coverage.statusNote: The frozen blueprint marked this MISSING everywhere. CURRENT honest state: Phase 1.3 CLOSED the close-the-loop MECHANISM via REUSE (no new engine) — captureProgressionOutcome() + getReassessmentSignal() write/derive realized outcomes into validation_loop_outcomes, gated by the longitudinalOutcomeCapture flag. So the mechanism is now CODE-COMPLETE (Coverage), moving this from MISSING → PARTIAL; what remains is per-journey ADOPTION (real re-administration/outcome volume, currently honest-low/0, reported SEPARATELY by composeOutcomeTailAdoption — Adoption⟂Coverage, null≠0). This phase does NOT build new outcome machinery.

gaps.title: Teacher / Counsellor survey is a true dead-end (no downstream journey)
gaps.evidence: CUSTOMER_JOURNEY_MODEL.teacher_counsellor=DEAD_END: survey input captured, zero continuation. The jt_stakeholder_observations substrate exists (staff-only) but is not wired into a downstream step.
gaps.remediation: Convert to a continuation using the EXISTING jt_stakeholder_observations substrate (no rebuild) — a flag-gated additive enhancement; deferred + classified honestly here. Never fabricate a journey.

gaps.title: Parent / Mentor / Faculty journeys have thin or nested tails
gaps.evidence: parent_support / mentor_mentee / faculty_students = PARTIAL: support-action + engagement substrate exists (journeyTailCompletion) but the tails are thin; faculty is a nested batch-confined scope, not a first-class top-level surface.
gaps.remediation: Deepen the support/engagement tail surfaces (reuse jt_* substrate) and promote faculty to a first-class scoped view. Flag-gated, additive. Adoption-gated.

gaps.title: Universal close-the-loop outcome tail: mechanism closed (1.3 reuse), ADOPTION pending
gaps.evidence: outcome_tail=PARTIAL: Phase 1.3 closed the MECHANISM via reuse (captureProgressionOutcome + getReassessmentSignal → validation_loop_outcomes, gated by longitudinalOutcomeCapture). Real per-journey re-administration/outcome volume is currently honest-low/0 (reported by composeOutcomeTailAdoption). Coverage⟂Adoption never composited.
gaps.remediation: Drive ADOPTION (real re-administration volume) + wire the tail per-journey via REUSE of the 1.3 hook. Not an engineering gap; no new engine. null≠0.

gaps.title: Some results/analysis surfaces lack a "next step" conversion CTA
gaps.evidence: Frontend audit: StudentDashboard ResultsSummary can terminate without a clear next-step; GapAnalysisPage / CompetencyRoleTransitionPage show visualisations without a direct "enrol / contact mentor" conversion at the bottom.
gaps.remediation: Add a next-step CTA into the EXISTING canonical flow (no new journey). Additive UX; preserve byte-identical-OFF.

gaps.title: Public consent-approval surface lacks a clean redirect back into the dashboard journey
gaps.evidence: Frontend audit: ParentConsentApprovePage performs an action via a public link but does not redirect back into a dashboard journey; OnboardingRegisterPage feels disconnected from the primary auth flow.
gaps.remediation: Add a post-action redirect into the parent dashboard journey; reconcile onboarding entrances (KEEP_ALL entrances, just connect them). Additive.

gaps.title: SiteMap lists UI-shell / stub routes with minimal functional depth
gaps.evidence: Frontend audit: SiteMap.tsx enumerates routes (e.g. gamification, ld-integration) that exist as shells/stubs — orphan surfaces, not part of a completed persona journey.
gaps.remediation: Either complete the stub into a real journey step or remove the orphan link. Out of scope for this audit — flagged honestly, never claimed as complete.

duplicate_entrances.rationale: Multiple entrances to ONE flow — the pre-existing CTAs are current behaviour; removing entrances would break byte-identical-OFF. Not duplicate journeys.
Different entry points to assessment; flagship consumer flow vs flag-gated adaptive runtime. Keep separate, keep both.

enterprise_ready.note: ONE canonical Customer Journey Model: a FROZEN 8-step spine + 5 reusable templates, with every persona journey mapped to all 8 axes (persona/lifecycle/assessment/AI/reports/dashboards/outcomes/KPIs) and verified against the live repo. The front-half (entry→diagnose→recommend→grow) is broadly SUPPORTED; the universal close-the-loop OUTCOME tail mechanism is now CODE-COMPLETE via REUSE of the Phase-1.3 progression-outcome-capture hook (no new engine/table/DDL), so it moved from MISSING → PARTIAL. What remains is ADOPTION (real re-administration/outcome volume, currently honest-low/0, reported SEPARATELY by composeOutcomeTailAdoption) plus classified residual gaps: ONE true dead-end (Teacher/Counsellor, GAP-J1), thin support/engagement tails (GAP-J2), and minor frontend CTA/redirect/orphan items (GAP-J4/J5/J6). No Launch-Critical journey gap; no duplicate journeys (multiple entrances to ONE flow are KEEP_ALL). Coverage⟂Confidence⟂Outcome⟂Adoption are reported separately and never composited; null≠0; nothing fabricated.

outcome_tail.note: ADOPTION axis only — exercise of the (Phase-1.3 reuse-instrumented) universal close-the-loop outcome tail. SEPARATE from Coverage; never composited. null = unreadable, 0 = measured-empty. Demo subjects excluded. The capture hook is gated by the longitudinalOutcomeCapture flag, so non-zero adoption accrues only as real subjects re-administer existing assessments. This phase builds NO new outcome machinery.

persona_linkage.note: Persona⟂Outcome linkage validated by a READ-TIME join (no persona column added, zero DDL). Per-persona counts below k_min are suppressed (masked) for anonymity. linkage_present:false means the join was unreadable, NOT that outcomes are zero (null≠0). Coverage⟂Outcome⟂Confidence never composited.
